subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thou seest me aflame with the fire of Thy love, bereft of patience through my separation from the Kingdom of Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی مضطرما بنار محبتک و منصرم الصبر من هجرانی من ملکوت لقائک و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @pain of love; love as veil, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
